# Jedna request_action protocol v1 fixtures

Vendored from `jedna` accepted commit
`17ada2012112abf1df2cd2a31342fcad2f3ed18a`, directory
`spec/fixtures/protocol`. JSON whitespace was compacted only inside the
`other_players` arrays.

Source SHA-256 values:

- `request_action_normal.json`: `40cdb9cf0ad4727a1c2fda1b338f7e29cae7432d2a5f23fe429047fd95475160`
- `request_action_after_draw.json`: `b722627135e4fa468b2fa18987cbbdc11b826f10657709853cb006a207b4e2e6`
- `request_action_plus_two_war.json`: `e67546188b189595d138aba8bcba892092fbf54194a94d5edfeb79d5ea5a79c3`
- `request_action_wd4_war.json`: `550e7853ab9cf3da8b2d027a61b441bba34b3da9f6b99913eda41dd5f0ec268d`

Contract tests compare semantic JSON, so formatting differences are irrelevant.
